title: lithocarpus campylolepis
intro: Lithocarpus campylolepis, also known as the campylolepis copper beech, is a species of evergreen tree in the family Fagaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lithocarpus campylolepis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and protecting against certain diseases. The herbal preparations of Lithocarpus campylolepis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote healthy aging.
